transport: authenticated encrypted LAN MCP control plane
finding: The shared project was published and enumerable on the primary. The secondary had no persisted Drive workspace, so selected-workspace discovery stopped before contacting the project listing endpoint.
fixContract: Browse shared projects explicitly catalogs only bounded app-owned .syzygy-projects roots visible to the connected account.
Catalog discovery works without a previously selected local workspace.
Join validates and persists the result's exact parent workspace before registering the Drive-bound project.
Selected-workspace research reads, writes, publishing, polling, sync, and MCP diagnostics remain fail-closed.
privacy: No OAuth token, refresh token, Drive file ID, project title, document content, pairing key, or LAN address is recorded.
The short folder code and project count are the content-minimized diagnostic values exposed by the released MCP contract.
remainingGate: Build the patch, update both physical installations, discover and Join from a secondary with no selected workspace, then prove equal project/document identity and converged Yjs state.
